---
title: "About"
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/41604567
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/hunghuuhoang

---
### Quick intro
I'm Peter Hoang, an ML/AI Engineer with a product mindset. I've been writing software from 2009.

My current AI stack is Python-based (Pytorch, Huggingface, ...). Other software techs I've used, and still being quite productive with, include: Django, Javascript, Html/Css, Postgres, and a little of React Native. 

In 2024, one of my focuses is to learn to be more active on <a href="https://github.com/peterhungh3" target="_blank">Github</a> and continue to learn and expand my knowledge of AI and software in general. 


### Short CV
<a id="short-cv"></a>
Below is a brief version of my CV. For my full CV with more details, please check out my <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang/" target="_blank">Linkedin profile</a>. 

- Sept/2023 -: I started my Msc in CS at <a href="https://www.csd.uwo.ca" target="_blank">Western University</a>, Canada. This marked my full-time study & work on AI. I feel fortunate that this comeback was coincidental with a big wave in Deep learning.  
- 2021 & 2022: I started reviewing key concepts & background Math in AI on a part-time basis. During this time, I did 2 finetuning projects that were quite interesting (See my Linkedin Projects). Reviewing/learning these fundamental knowledge has been instrumental in helping me get up to speed onAI/Deep learning.
- 2013 - 2023: I worked on 2 small startup projects, both about SaaS for learning English, targetting the Vietnamese market (initially, but they never managed to expand out of Vietnam). The apps didn't take off, but the consolation price for me was that the apps, in combination, still attracted more than 1.5 million free users and benefited many who used them. And, I learned (or forced to learn :) a lot about various fields. 
- 2009 - 2013: I worked as an NLP & software engineer in Singapore. 
- 2005 - 2009: I did my Bachelor in Computing at <a href="https://www.comp.nus.edu.sg/" target="_blank">NUS</a>, Singapore. And with a minor in Math.  

### Connect

Please connect with me on <a href="https://twitter.com/hunghuuhoang" target="_blank">Twitter</a> (for sharings on diverse topics) and <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang/" target="_blank">Linkedin</a> (for sharings on tech-focused topics). 

My main blog is at <a href="https://peterhung.org/?r=ph-gh" target="_blank">peterhung.org</a> where I write in both Vietnamese and English. For English-only articles, please use <a href="https://peterhung.org/tag/english-articles/" target="_blank">this link</a>.
